caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in a room decorated with various framed photos on the wall. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and clothing racks are visible in the background. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, pointing forward and moving his arm. On-screen text in the bottom left corner reads "THE" and in the bottom right "REALLY TOT". The scene remains static in terms of location and participants, focusing on the man's upper body as he talks and gestures. By the final frame, he has turned his head slightly to the side while continuing to point his finger toward the left of the frame.
